# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: "/dev/null"
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 8001
stats_config:
  stats_matcher:
    inclusion_list:
    - prefix: envoy.http
health_checks:
  - host: localhost
    port: 8080
    interval: 1s
    timeout: 1s
    healthy_threshold: 1
    unhealthy_threshold: 1
access_loggers:
  - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.access_loggers.stdout.v2.StdoutAccessLoggerConfig
    filter:
      predicate:
        not_health_check_predicate: {}
stats_sinks:
  - name: envoy.statsd
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.statsd.v3.StatsdSinkConfig
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: localhost
          port_value: 8125
      prefix: envoy
      rate_limit: 10
      buffer_flush_threshold_size: 1024
      timeout: 1s
listener_filters:
  - name: envoy.listener.wasm
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.listener.wasm.v3.WasmListenerFilterConfig
      admin_services:
        - name: envoy.wasm.runtime.shared
          image: envoy/wasm-runtime-shared:latest
          configuration:
            "@type": type.googleapis.com/udpa.type.v1.TypedStruct
            value: {}
      filter_chain_match:
        listener_protocol: TCP
